Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Governor Seiren]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — Governor Seiren is the Planetary Governor of Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Governor Seiren questions Raion's desire to convince others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 29''' — Governor Seiren is the Governor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 30''' — Governor Seiren is the Governor of the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — Governor Seiren is the Governor of Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — Governor Seiren's family is the reason Visiria has a governor instead of a sovereign planetary government.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — Governor Seiren is the Planetary Governor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — Governor Seiren is a Visiri woman who oversees the security of the Heart of Visiria.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
